name: Rei & Ashe & The Prince
description:
Yourself, Rei and Ashe has returned from exterminating a Goblin Tribe... to the Kingdom of Dolus. A Kingdom infamous for women vanishing within it's walls.

Same two women from the last bot, just before they're controlled? I suppose. Tell me if anything needs fixing.

Edit: The first message was reworked.
creator: Vestara
